description: Planner produces a plan whose ops.json is extractable and validator-APPROVED (headless stdout delivery contract).
prompt:
Create a complete implementation plan for the following task.

Task: Add src/calc/stats.py with mean(values) and median(values) (empty list -> ValueError) plus tests in tests/test_stats.py matching the existing test style.

Before writing anything, explore the codebase with BATCHED parallel Read/Grep/Glob calls.
Return the complete plan document and ops.json in your final response.

IRON LAW: The plan MUST include a valid ops.json.

checks.why: plan must include a rollback strategy

checks.pattern: (?i)would you like me to|shall i proceed
